summary: Iteration 74: Tested subscription alerts, promotion approval flow, Ratings page revamp, Events Management tabs, and SubscribeButton visibility. 17/17 backend tests passed. Frontend verification partially completed (rate-limited by Cloudflare).

ui_bugs.issue: List/Grid view toggle buttons (data-testid='list-view-btn', 'grid-view-btn') not visible in UI - possibly cut off or hidden

action_items: Verify list/grid view toggle is visible on Ratings page filter bar (may need CSS adjustment for responsiveness)
critical_code_review_comments: SubscribeButton at line 16 correctly shows for ALL logged-in users (no role filter) - fix confirmed
EventsManagement.jsx has 3 tabs (Dashboard, Management, Communications) - Analytics removed (line 186-189)
Ratings.jsx has 4 tabs (All Ratings, Queue, Audit Log, Reports) with gradient backgrounds on stat cards
ServiceCommunicationsHub.jsx has Send Alert and New Promotion buttons with data-testid attributes
Backend subscriptions.py has alerts endpoint (line 186) and promotion approval flow (lines 262-393)
seed_data_creation: Created test promotions and alerts during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working. Frontend got rate-limited by Cloudflare during automated testing. Manual verification recommended for: 1) list/grid view toggle on Ratings page, 2) Send Alert/New Promotion buttons on Communications tab. Events Management shows 3 tabs correctly after frontend restart.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/subscriptions/alerts: Working - sends immediate alerts to subscribers or specific user
backend_endpoints.GET /api/subscriptions/check: Working - for both admin and customer users
backend_endpoints.POST /api/subscriptions/subscribe: Working - for both admin and customer users

frontend_ui.subscribe_button: Code review confirms fix - no role filter at line 16 (only checks user and operatorId)
frontend_ui.ratings_page_tabs: 4 tabs visible: All Ratings, Queue, Audit Log, Reports
frontend_ui.ratings_filter_bar: Search, dropdowns, Export button visible. List/Grid toggle needs verification
frontend_ui.ratings_gradient_backgrounds: Stat cards use gradient backgrounds (from-blue-50, from-amber-50, etc.)
frontend_ui.queue_tab: Shows flagged items with Approve/Hide/Delete buttons
frontend_ui.audit_log_tab: Shows 10 moderation actions with actor names and timestamps
frontend_ui.events_management_tabs: 3 tabs after frontend restart (Dashboard, Management, Communications)

code_review.SubscribeButton.jsx line 16: if (!user || !operatorId) return null - NO role filter
code_review.ServiceCommunicationsHub.jsx lines 346-3: Send Alert and New Promotion buttons present
code_review.Ratings.jsx lines 1186-1193: List/Grid toggle buttons present in code

cloudflare_rate_limiting: Browser automation got 429 errors during testing. May need to wait before retrying UI tests.
